mrp_clause_text:
SECOND AMENDMENT AND AGREEMENT

THIS SECOND AMENDMENT AND AGREEMENT (this "Agreement" or "Second Amendment") is entered into as of _____________, (the "Second Amendment Effective Date"), by and among CrossBoundary Energy Ghana LTD, a company limited by shares, registered in the Federal Republic of Ghana and having its registered address at 8th Floor, One Airport Square, Accra Metropolitan Area, Greater Accra, Ghana ("Seller") and Polytanks Ghana LTD, a company incorporated in the Federal Republic of Ghana and having its registered address at 15 Dadeban Road, North Industrial Area, Ghana ("Buyer"), each a "Party" and together, the "Parties."

RECITALS

A. Buyer and Seller entered into a Solar Services Agreement ("SSA") dated on or about February 28, 2022 in connection with the design, construction and operation of a photovoltaic electricity generation system ("Facility") for the benefit of the Buyer. Under this Agreement, the Seller agreed to construct a facility with total solar capacity of 2,592 kWp;

B. Buyer and Seller revised the Initial Term under the SSA in a First Amendment dated on or about July 5, 2023, by adding 5 years such that the term of the SSA runs for a period of 25 years, increasing the Solar Discount under the SSA from 21% to 22%, removing the escalation on the Minimum Solar Price and revising the Early Termination Charges applicable to the final Facility size.

C. Notwithstanding the passage of time since initial signature, Buyer and Seller hereby seek to amend the SSA to provide for such changes as set forth in this Second Amendment.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the premises set forth above and other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the Parties hereby agree as follows:

1. Definitions and Interpretation.

1.1. "Second Amendment Execution Date" means the date of signature of this Agreement.

Unless otherwise defined in this Second Amendment, capitalized terms used in this Agreement have the respective meanings ascribed to them in the SSA unless otherwise changed in the First Amendment. The rules of interpretation set forth in the SSA shall apply to this Second Amendment.

1.2. "First Amendment Execution Date" means the date of signature of the First Amendment.

2. SSA Amendments. Unless expressly specified otherwise, the following amendments to the SSA shall be effective from the Second Amendment Execution Date:

2.1. CP Longstop Date. The "CP Longstop Date" set forth in Part 1 of the SSA (Key Project Terms) is amended to read: 365 days after the First Amendment Execution Date.
notes: This document is a Second Amendment to a Solar Services Agreement (SSA) between CrossBoundary Energy Ghana LTD and Polytanks Ghana LTD. The document shows that the Solar Discount was previously increased from 21% to 22% in a First Amendment dated July 5, 2023. No MRP formula is visible in this excerpt - this appears to be the opening sections of the amendment covering definitions and project terms rather than pricing methodology.
